scenes.title: The Failing Tea Shop
scenes.summary: Establish Maya's struggling tea shop in Portland - rain outside, empty inside, she's exhausted and cynical.

shots.prompt: Establishing shot of a cozy but neglected tea shop in Portland, rain pattering against large front windows, worn wooden floors, dusty teapots on shelves, only two customers sit at mismatched tables, grey afternoon light filters through. Warm but melancholic atmosphere.

Medium shot of Maya, tired early-40s woman with messy bun, wearing tea-stained apron over cream sweater, wiping a counter with a worn rag. She sighs heavily, no smile, exhaustion evident in her posture. A CLOSED sign hangs in the window behind her.

scenes.title: Lab Escape
scenes.summary: A quick, exciting but not scary sequence of Rexi escaping from a shady biotech lab.

shots.prompt: Quick shot of a shadowy high-tech biotech laboratory at night, glowing equipment, cages. A flash of iridescent green feathers - Rexi the Velociraptor bursts through a broken containment door, feathers catching the emergency lights, elegant and fast, NOT scary, more like an elegant dancer escaping.

scenes.title: Finding Home
scenes.summary: Rexi arrives at the tea shop and hides in the back room.

shots.prompt: Rain-dampened Portland street at night, Rexi the elegant Velociraptor with iridescent green-copper feathers slips through an alley, her large amber eyes reflecting streetlights, long tail graceful behind her. She approaches the back door of Willow & Leaf Tea Co.

Inside the tea shop's back room, cluttered with tea boxes, Rexi emerges from shadows. Her feathered plumage glows in dim light, she sniffs the air delicately with her beak-like snout, large amber eyes full of curiosity and intelligence. She discovers containers of rare tea leaves and leans in to smell them with apparent delight.

scenes.title: The Tea Sommelier
scenes.summary: The magical moment - Rexi uses her incredible sense of smell to create perfect tea blends.

shots.prompt: Close-up of Rexi's elegant bird-like hands - three long fingers - delicately picking and mixing tea leaves with surprising dexterity. Her amber eyes half-closed in concentration, feathers ruffled slightly. She sniffs the blend and makes a small satisfied sound.

Maya discovers Rexi in the back room, frozen in disbelief. Rexi turns slowly, large amber eyes blinking gently, holding a tin of premium oolong. Instead of fear, wonder spreads across Maya's face. This is NOT scary - it's magical.

scenes.title: Transformation
scenes.summary: The tea shop transforms - customers flock in, Maya smiles for the first time.

shots.prompt: The tea shop now bustling with customers, warm golden light, people sipping tea and chatting enthusiastically. Maya moves between tables with renewed energy, a genuine smile on her face for the first time. Through the window, Portland sunshine breaks through clouds.

Heartwarming close-up: Maya and Rexi side by side behind the counter. Rexi's elegant feathered head reaches just above Maya's shoulder. Maya reaches up to gently scratch under Rexi's chin feathers - Rexi's eyes close in contentment, a soft rumbling purr-like sound. Pure warmth and connection.

scenes.title: Teaser Closing
scenes.summary: Playful closing shot that captures the film's tone.

shots.prompt: Playful medium shot: Rexi sits at one of the tea tables, awkwardly but charmingly trying to sip from a tiny teacup with her beak-like snout, one feathered hand holding the handle. Maya watches, laughing genuinely. Warm golden hour light, cozy shop atmosphere. Amélie meets Paddington vibes.
